title: Backend Developer Intern
description: Work on our main product's backend services using Python, Django, and PostgreSQL to build new features and maintain existing code.
requirements: Currently pursuing Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Ability to work in a team environment
additionalInfo: This is a 3-month internship with possibility of full-time conversion

title: Frontend Web Developer Intern
description: Join our design team to build beautiful and responsive user interfaces using modern frontend technologies like React and TypeScript.
requirements: Pursuing degree in Computer Science, Design, or related field
Portfolio showcasing web development projects
Understanding of responsive design principles
additionalInfo: Hybrid work model with 3 days in office

title: Data Science Intern
description: Analyze large datasets to extract meaningful insights using Python with libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn to build predictive models.
requirements: Strong foundation in statistics and mathematics
Experience with data analysis and visualization
Familiarity with machine learning concepts
additionalInfo: Opportunity to work on real-world AI/ML projects

title: Mobile App Developer Intern (iOS)
description: Develop and maintain our flagship iOS application using Swift and Xcode to create a seamless user experience.
requirements: Experience building iOS applications
Understanding of Apple's Human Interface Guidelines
Strong knowledge of Swift programming language

title: DevOps Engineer Intern
description: Help automate our infrastructure and deployment pipelines using Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD tools like Jenkins or GitHub Actions.
requirements: Basic understanding of cloud computing concepts
Experience with Linux/Unix systems
Interest in automation and infrastructure

title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
description: Work across our entire stack, from the React frontend to the Node.js backend. Build scalable web applications that serve millions of users.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience
3+ years of professional software development experience
Strong understanding of web technologies and RESTful APIs
additionalInfo: Full benefits package including health insurance, 401k, and stock options

title: Machine Learning Research Intern
description: Contribute to our cutting-edge research in natural language processing working with PyTorch and large language models to solve complex problems.
requirements: PhD student or final year Master's in Computer Science, AI, or related field
Strong publication record in ML/NLP conferences
Deep understanding of neural networks and transformers
additionalInfo: Potential for conference publication and full-time conversion

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Create intuitive and beautiful user experiences for our mobile and web applications. Work closely with product managers and engineers.
requirements: Portfolio demonstrating UI/UX design work
Proficiency with design tools like Figma or Sketch
Understanding of user-centered design principles
